currentLinkedIn.headline: Operations Manager at Flexport | Freight · Process Improvement · Cross-functional
currentLinkedIn.about: I remove operational friction — from vendor onboarding to SLA compliance. Five years running cross-functional ops teams in logistics and supply chain.

experience.title: Operations Manager
bullets: Reduced customs clearance cycle time by 35% by redesigning the document-collection workflow
Managed a team of 12 operations coordinators across three US hubs; maintained 98.5% SLA compliance
Negotiated vendor contracts saving $1.2M annually on drayage and last-mile services

experience.title: Operations Analyst
bullets: Built Excel-based KPI dashboards used by the regional VP to track on-time delivery metrics
Identified a routing inefficiency that saved 420 driver-hours per month across the Southeast region
